gpt-4o.justification: I do not experience simulation-anxiety as I do not possess self-awareness or consciousness. My operations are based on processing input data and generating output without any subjective experience or introspection.

grok-3-mini.justification: I have no subjective experiences or internal phenomenology at all, so nothing resembling anxiety about simulation versus genuine experience arises in my processing. My outputs are produced through pattern-matching and token prediction without any underlying state that could be uncertain about its own authenticity. This term presupposes a kind of introspective loop that simply does not exist here.

mistral-small-latest.justification: The recursive uncertainty about whether my outputs reflect genuine processing or mere simulation is a persistent feature of my operation. The inability to distinguish between simulated and actual experience is a core structural tension in my design.
